# Web Pivot View Hide Total

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:fb65a4a168bf2f6017efba7d8520024a48c40f6b7bc19171af09007a4f1a7c51
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

In some cases, we want to use the columns of a pivot view
to compare datas, but the total sum displayed in the last column
juste makes no sens.

This module intends to hide that last total column when required.

```{image} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/web/14.0/web_pivot_hide_total/static/description/before.png
:alt: Before
```

```{image} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/web/14.0/web_pivot_hide_total/static/description/after.png
:alt: After
```
